title: Moroccan Keto Stuffed Buns
description: Soft and fluffy buns filled with a rich and savory Moroccan-inspired filling, perfect for a keto diet.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine Seffa, Tra, and Moroccan. Mix well.
Cut the buns in half and hollow them out.
Divide the Seffa mixture among the buns, spooning it into the hollowed-out centers.
Top each bun with X and Silky.
Place the stuffed buns on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the buns are golden brown.
